title: Telematics Event (live stream)
description: One streaming telematics reading emitted by generate_telematics_stream.py as NDJSON, intended for a Microsoft Fabric Eventstream / Eventhouse (KQL) source (plan Steps 18-20). The Activator rule / Operations Agent watches for idle_minutes > 120 and/or a non-null fault_code; the injected spike window (is_spike=true) produces those conditions for the watch+act demo.

ts.description: Event time, ISO-8601 UTC; advances across the feed.

idle_minutes.description: Minutes idle; > 120 triggers the idle-vehicle alert.

fault_code.description: OBD-II-like code; non-null triggers the maintenance-fault alert.

is_spike.description: True while the event is an injected, elevated spike reading.
